about.title: About me
about.intro: IT Engineer with more than 8 years of experience in different projects related with web development, data analytics data science, ETL and deployment. My stack in the backend side includes Python and Django, in the frontend side is using HTML, CSS, Js and Bootstrap. Also I have been responsible for deployment in some cloud projects where I have used AWS, GCP and Heroku. In addition, I have worked in projects related to Artificial Intelligence or data science where I have used python, pandas, ML, matplotlib.
about.intro2: I am passionate about challenges so I enjoy solving problems creatively and always try to do the things in the best way. For this reason I want to be part of a team where I can share my experience and improve my skills.

highlights: Development of new features for the financial area
Applied payment corrections in production databases
Implementation and maintenance of payment gateways
Improved efficiency in payment-related ticket resolution

positions.position: Full Stack Web Developer / DevOps Engineer / Tech Lead

Database refactoring and code maintenance
Managed a microservices system and server deployments
Updated a legacy chatbot and integrated it into a React project
Web scraping with Selenium and chatbot training with Rasa
Fixed frontend issues in Angular related to Axios HTTP requests

positions.position: Backend Web Developer / Data Scientist Assistant
highlights: Developed the base code for data import
Reduced by 50% the execution time of data import
Developed a plan for database refactoring approved by the team and superiors, resulting in a 15% reduction of a 140-table database
Implemented OOP on database models
Developed a prototype of a microservice
Worked in an AI team as analyst, ML apprentice and intermediary with development and devops areas
Found a way to process 10 million records in the cloud using pandas and MongoDB
Team leader for a data science project
Developed a prediction model for Kickstarter campaign success
Participated in the development of a service prototype with commercial scope
